reviews.comment: The two instructors were very friendly and nice gentlemen. They were very knowledgeable of CPR and made me feel comfortable to be learning from them. The class was very informative and helped me to understand both the ways of CPR and first aid. They answered multiple questions throughout the session that very detailed and well-put. After taking this certification course, I feel more confident within myself to provide CPR to someone if I ever come into a time I may need to use it.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Dane.  It's great to hear that it was good experience for you, and we look forward to doing it again for you in the future!
